name: digital-evidence-runner
description: NPM scripts to run the Digital Evidence apps

scripts.start: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && mvn -f spring-app/pom.xml spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=mongo
scripts.start:mongo: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && mvn -f spring-app/pom.xml spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=mongo
scripts.start:console: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && mvn -q compile exec:java
